creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
In this version,
1. The program data now obey the NOPORTDATA setting;
2. Re-organize the pkg-message to be compliant with other ports' style;
3. Add a patch to let pure -c accepts env CC & CXX:
https://code.google.com/p/pure-lang/issues/detail?id=53

-- 
Zhihao Yuan
The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
